name: Deadly Synergy Rivals Deck
plot:
While using this Rivals deck, adjacent friendly fighters are united.

Enemy fighters adjacent to a united friendly fighter are Flanked.

If each other friendly fighter is slain, the remaining friendly fighter is united.

cards.name: Aggressive Unity
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if 3 or more melee Attacks were made by united friendly fighters this battle round.

cards.name: Beatdown
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if the same enemy fighter was picked to be the target of 3 or more different friendly fighters' melee Attacks this battle round.

cards.name: Closed Down
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if a united friendly fighter is holding a treasure token that was held by an enemy fighter this battle round.

cards.name: Got Your Back!
cards.text: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter's failed Attack if the target was a unite friendly fighter.

cards.name: Helping Hand
cards.text: Score this immediately after a united friendly fighter's successful Attack if the Attack roll contained any {icon:single-support}.

cards.name: Hemmed In
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if an enemy leader was slain by a united friendly fighter this battle round.

cards.name: Inevitable Outcome
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if 2 or more united friendly fighter are adjacent to the same enemy fighter.

cards.name: Infiltrate
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if the target was in neutral or enemy territory and either the attacker was united or the target was Flanked and/or Surrounded.

cards.name: Outmuscle
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if an enemy fighter was driven back as part of a united friendly fighter's successful Attack this battle round. Restricted

cards.name: Tag Team
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if they have no Move or Charge tokens and either the attacker was united or the target was Flanked and/or Surrounded.

cards.name: Tandem Assault
cards.text: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter is slain by a friendly fighter's Attack if the attacker was united or the target was Flanked and/or Surrounded.

cards.name: United Aid
cards.text: Score this immediately after you make a Save roll for a united friendly fighter if there were more successes in the Save roll than the Attacker roll and the Save roll contained any {icon:single-support}. If you are the underdog, the Save roll does not have to contain any {icon:single-support}.

cards.name: Another Swing
cards.text: Play this immediately after a united friendly fighter's failed melee Attack if the attacker is adjacent to 2 united friendly fighters. That fighter Attacks again using a melee weapon, but the Damage characteristic of that weapon is reduced to 1.

cards.name: Army of Two
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter. That fighter is united in the next turn.

cards.name: Brother-in-Arms
cards.text: Play this immediately before you pick a melee weapon as part of a united friendly fighter's Attack. Pick a united friendly fighter adjacent to the attacker. Use 1 of that fighter's melee weapons for that Attack instead.

cards.name: Defiant Duo
cards.text: Pick 2 adjacent united friendly fighters. If you are the underdog, pick 2 united friendly fighters instead. Give 1 of those fighters a Guard token and then heal the other fighter.

cards.name: Out of Nowhere
cards.text: Play this immediately after you make an Attack roll for a united friendly fighter. Change 1 dice in that Attack roll to {icon:single-support} or {icon:double-support}.

cards.name: Selfless Parry
cards.text: Play this immediately after a united friendly fighter is picked to be the target of an Attack. Pick a united friendly fighter adjacent to the target. The target has that fighter's Save characteristic for that Attack.

cards.name: Sidestep
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex.

cards.name: Take One for the Team
cards.text: Play this immediately after a united friendly fighter is picked to be the target of an Attack. Pick a united friendly fighter adjacent to the target and within range of the weapon being used for the Attack. That fighter must be the target of that Attack instead.

cards.name: Timed Strike
cards.text: Play this immediately after you pick a melee weapon as part of an Attack for a friendly fighter that is not united. That weapon has +1 Attack dice for that Attack.

cards.name: Unified Front
cards.text: United friendly fighters have +1 Save in the next turn, to a maximum of 3.

cards.name: Battering Ram
cards.text: (Errata update) Attack rolls made for this fighter as part of melee Attacks always count as having more {icon:crit} than the Save roll for the purposes of Stand Fast and Overrun.

cards.name: Coordinated Deathblow
cards.text:
Melee Attack action
{icon:hex} 1 {icon:sword} 3 {icon:damage} 2
This weapon has Grievous while this fighter is united.

cards.name: Duellist
cards.text: Footwork: Immediately after this fighter has Attacked, you can push this fighter 1 hex.

cards.name: Entangling Strike
cards.text:
Melee Attack action
{icon:hex} 1 {icon:hammer} 3 {icon:damage} 1
This weapon has Cleave and Ensnare if the target is Flanked and/or Surrounded.

cards.name: Great Fortitude
cards.text: This fighter has +1 Health.

cards.name: Keen Eye
cards.text: This fighter's melee weapons have +1 Attack dice.

cards.name: Rush to Aid
cards.text: Assist: Immediately after this fighter has Attacked, you can pick a united friendly fighter. Push this fighter up to 2 hexes. That push must end adjacent to that united friendly fighter.

cards.name: Shared Incentive
cards.text:
This upgrade can only be given to your leader.
This fighter has +1 Move.
United friendly fighters have +1 Move if they are adjacent to this fighter when they start that Move.

cards.name: Spurred Momentum
cards.text: Driven: Immediately after this fighter's successful Attack, if this fighter was united, remove their Move and Stagger tokens and then discard this card.

cards.name: Titan of Combat
cards.text: This fighter is united.
